MINI MINUTES: MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE:
APPEARANCE: STEWART J. SCHWARTZ, (510)527-9007 FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT BEHJATI; ROBERT CHARLES WARD, 421-6500 FOR CROSS DEFT. NANCY DISPIRITO
RULING: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. COUNSEL INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE MAIN CASE WAS SETTLED. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON X-COMPL HELD. CASE SETTLED, TERMS WERE PLACED ON THE RECORD.
